MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "添加照片", tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp))
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.AddPhotoAlternate, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp))
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.CalendarToday, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp))

MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.ChevronRight, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half), modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp))
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.PersonAdd, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, modifier = Modifier.size(22.dp))
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Icon(icon, contentDescription = null, tint = if (isSelected) color else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp))
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Text("选择人物", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary, fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium)

MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$Text(label, color = if (isSelected) color else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, fontWeight = if (isSelected) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Medium, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium)

MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$border = if (isSelected) BorderStroke(1.5.dp, color.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)) else BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half))

MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$border = if (isSelected) BorderStroke(1.5.dp, style.color.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)) else BorderStroke(1.dp, MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half))
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$color = if (isSelected) style.color.copy(alpha = 0.1f) else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$leadingIcon = { Icon(Icons.Default.Event, contentDescription = null, tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)) }
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$placeholder = { Text("写下关于这份礼物的描述...", color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)) }
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$placeholder = { Text("如：机械键盘、护肤品", color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)) }
MaxLineLength:AddGiftComponents.kt$placeholder = { Text("如：生日、纪念日", color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)) }
MaxLineLength:GiftDetailComponents.kt$.
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreen.kt$Icon(Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "返回", tint = OnSurface, modifier = Modifier.size(22.dp))
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Storage, contentDescription = null, tint = if (isSelected) SignalElectric else TextGray, modifier = Modifier.size(12.dp))
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Icon(Icons.Default.Storage, contentDescription = null, tint = if (selectedContactId == null) SignalElectric else TextGray, modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp))
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Icon(type.toStyle().icon, contentDescription = null, tint = if (isSelected) typeColor else TextGray, modifier = Modifier.size(12.dp))
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$RetroMeter(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f), label = "A面 · 送出", count = sentCount, total = totalCount.coerceAtLeast(1), color = SignalAmber)
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$RetroMeter(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f), label = "B面 · 收到", count = receivedCount, total = totalCount.coerceAtLeast(1), color = SignalGreen)
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Row
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Text(String.format(Locale.US, "%02d", count), fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 13.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = color)
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Text(if (count > 0) "$count" else "", fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 7.sp, color = style.color, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Text(text = contact.name, color = if (selectedContactId == contact.id) SignalElectric else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface)

MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$Text(type.displayName.first().toString(), fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 7.sp, color = if (count > 0) style.color else TextGray.copy(alpha = 0.3f))

MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$border = if (isSelected) BorderStroke(1.dp, typeColor.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half)) else BorderStroke(0.5.dp, CardBorder.copy(alpha = AnimationTokens.Alpha.half))
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(vertical = 2.dp).clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)).clickable { onContactSelect(contact.id) }
MaxLineLength:GiftsScreenComponents.kt$val animatedProgress by animateFloatAsState(targetValue = progress, animationSpec = tween(AnimationTokens.Duration.dramatic), label = "meter")
MaxLineLength:GiftsTapeComponents.kt$.
